name: rootlens-antd-tailwind-migration
title: brainstorm: RootLens AntD Tailwind UI migration
description: Migrate RootLens frontend visual layer to Ant Design components with Tailwind-powered layout while preserving existing API workflows.
creator: elebirds
notes: Migrated RootLens frontend to Ant Design components with Tailwind/Vite layout support and a top-navigation dashboard shell. Verified build, smoke, pytest, examples, ruff, and diff hygiene.
